content:
# Recommendations — next plan iter (post-iter-002)

## Headline
**No in-leg prover work remains.** GR-quot leg delivered + axiom-clean (iter-001); seed `Grassmannian.represents` sorry-free. All 26 open sorries are deferred-by-standing-directive or out-of-cone. The mechanical no-prover skip this iter was correct and will recur every iter until the input changes.

## Do NOT re-assign (blocked / deferred — plan agent must not dispatch)
- **SNAP** (`SectionGradedRing.lean`, 11 sorries) — shared with sibling `FBC-B_SNAP-chain`. Import sibling proofs at merge; do NOT prove independently (divergence risk). Only un-defer on an explicit USER_HINTS directive.
- **χ-blocked** (`QuotScheme.lean`: `hilbertPolynomial`, `QuotFunctor`, dependent `Grassmannian` functor) — χ-semantic, needs higher cohomology this i=0 leg lacks. Fills from cohomology leg at merge. Never build an H⁰ `Φ_s` under the χ label.
- **Weak `Grassmannian.representable` skeleton** — out-of-cone tracked debt; goal seed does not need it.

## Structural debt (next plan iter — NOT blocking; defer to merge-back)
Blueprint-doctor broken refs (logs/iter-002/blueprint-doctor.md) are extraction artifacts targeting labels outside the 3-seed cone. Do **not** edit in this leg (corrupts the byte-identical-to-parent three-way merge). They resolve at merge-back:
- `Cohomology_FlatBaseChange.tex`: 2 phantom `% archon:covers` files + 14 broken `\ref`.
- `Picard_GlueDescent.tex`: 4 broken `\cref`/`\uses` (`lem:gr_glueChartComponent_leg_compat`, `lem:gr_glueChartFamily_pullback_map_pi`).
- `Picard_QuotScheme.tex`: 13 broken `\cref` (localization/descent).
- `Picard_SectionGradedRing.tex`: 7 broken `\cref`/`\uses`.

## 1-to-1 coverage debt
None new this iter (no Lean decls added). The 326 leandag-unmatched nodes are pre-existing parent-inherited helpers, resolved at merge — do not author tex entries for them in this leg.

## Cheapest next action
The next substantive step is **external to the loop**: merge this leg back into *Quot-Foundations* (resolves all extraction-artifact doctor findings + unmatched backlog + the deferred SNAP/χ wiring), OR a `USER_HINTS.md` directive to import sibling SNAP proofs now. Absent either, the loop will continue mechanically skipping — that is the correct terminal behavior, not a stall.
